title: DC Edit | Ensure West Bengal Polls Are Fought Democratically
description: Whatever be the levels of resistance and legal challenges to the alleged machinations of SIR, protests should not descend to the levels that they did in Malda where a mob gheraoed seven judicial officers — appointed by the Supreme Court to speed up the appeals process for those whose names have gone missing from the rolls — and confining them without food, water, or toilet use for more than nine hours
